name: io.github.yonro/xmemo
title: XMemo
description: User-owned memory for AI agents, Copilot, Claude, IDEs, CLIs, and chat apps over remote MCP.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token issued by XMemo; send as an Authorization Bearer value.

headers.name: X-Memory-OS-Agent-ID
headers.description: Optional stable agent family id for attribution, for example 'claude-code' or 'copilot-cli'.

headers.name: X-Memory-OS-Agent-Instance-ID
headers.description: Optional stable local installation id for attribution; XMemo hashes it server-side.

environmentVariables.name: XMEMO_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token issued by XMemo for the stdio proxy. Optional for discovery; required for tool execution.

environmentVariables.name: XMEMO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional XMemo service base URL. Defaults to https://xmemo.dev.
